content: I'm sorry to hear that you're feeling this way. It's important to take time to reflect on your feelings and consider what you truly want. Communication is often key in relationships, so discussing your feelings with your husband might help. If you feel comfortable, seeking the support of a therapist or counselor could also be beneficial in sorting through your emotions and determining the best course of action for your situation. Ultimately, it's about finding what will make you happy and fulfilled.
